case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. ISRAEL M. MATOS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: WAIVER OF ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATOS, ISRAEL M. $821.65 PRINCIPAL, $166.58 INTEREST, $227.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,215.23, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $543.18 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. SERVED JUL-28-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MATOS, ISRAEL M.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $227.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MATOS, ISRAEL M.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MATOS, ISRAEL M.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT MATOS, ISRAEL M.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT MATOS, ISRAEL M. DOES 1 THRU 15, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-15-2008
DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS [CCP 1033] FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MATOS, ISRAEL M.
DECLARATION RE: PRE-JUDGMENT INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT: 1. DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 585) 2. ATTORNEY'S FEES & COSTS (CCP 1033) 3. COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS (EVID 1550) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 15, INCL.
